---
title: "Bundle Calculus"
---

Bundle calculus starts with product-bundle projection and fiber vocabulary, then adds base-preserving transition sanity laws. Nontrivial atlases, overlaps, cocycles, connections, curvature, and holonomy remain future work.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0002"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0003"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0004"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0006"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0007"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="P2BU-T0008"></div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
